title: Kimiya-yi Sa'adat: The Alchemy of Happiness
description: Al-Ghazali's Persian summary of the Ihya: how to transform the base metal of the nafs (ego) into the gold of the spirit.
introduction: Al-Ghazali's Persian summary of the Ihya: how to transform the base metal of the nafs (ego) into the gold of the spirit.

translation.text: Know thyself: you are not this body, you are not this appetite, you are not this anger. You are the heart, and the heart is a mirror of God.
